## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Affected package(s)

- [ ] `anyclaude-sdk`
- [ ] `anyclaude-react`
- [ ] examples
- [ ] docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` is clean for the package(s) I touched
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds for the affected package(s)
- [ ] No secrets / `.env` files committed (placeholders only in `.env.example`)
- [ ] No emojis added (Lucide / inline SVG only)
- [ ] Conventional Commit message(s)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` / docs if behavior or API changed
